segments.text: You see, the same act performed by a person who is completely ignorant, the resultant
punishment is least severe.
And if somebody knows the difference between what is pious and impious activity, still
performs the impious activity, then his punishment is more severe.
But the most severe punishment is given to one who performs sinful activities out of
atheism.
I don't care for God.
There is no God.
There is no next life.
For such people, the punishment is the most severe.
That is why the Acharyas, they show compassion upon such people who are acting.
Out of atheism, and try to preach Krishna consciousness among such atheists.
Otherwise, to preach Krishna consciousness among atheists is the most difficult.
They simply argue in various ways and they challenge and they mock and ridicule and even
harm devotees.
They become envious.
They become more envious when you try to preach to them.
This is Nithyananda Prabhu.
He was preaching about chanting.
And he even went to this Jagayan Madai, who were completely sinful and also envious of
devotees.
But still, Nithyananda Prabhu went to them and preached to them to save them.
And in return for his trying to help them or save them, what did he get?
He was attacked.
And his, you know, he was killed.
He was killed.
He was killed.
He was killed.
He was killed.
He was killed.
He was killed.
Before it started bleeding.
But still, he did not actually take offense.
This is the unlimited, causeless mercy of Lord Nithyananda.
And the guru who's coming in this parampara from Lord Nithyananda, Chaitanya Nithyananda.
The Acharyas in our Sampradaya particularly.
They are as merciful as Nithyananda.
That is why you see Prabhupada took the trouble to carry out the order of his guru and go
to those horrible places in the western countries and preach Krishna consciousness to save them
from grievous sinful activities.
The slaughtering cows by the millions.
Giving unnecessary pain out of atheism.
So such people are destined to suffer millions of lives, as Chaitanya Mahaprabhu says, for
every cow killed, as many thousands of years as there are hair on the body of the cow.
You can't even calculate how many millions of lives they have to suffer.
Such horrible suffering of it.
It's them, if they don't take to Krishna consciousness.
